title: Airlock Arithmetic
premise: A meteor strike has crippled the station's life support. With only 6 escape pods and 12 crew members, you must decide who lives and who stays. The station will run out of air in 90 minutes.
setting: Asteroid mining station 'Helios-7' in the asteroid belt, year 2147. The station has a command center, living quarters, medical bay, and docking ring. Emergency power is on, but life support is failing fast.
goal: Evacuate as many crew as possible using the 6 escape pods, while maintaining order and making justifiable decisions. Success: at least 6 crew evacuated safely. Failure: more than 6 crew left behind or chaos leading to pod loss.
gm_notes: Introduce complications: hidden damage may reduce pod capacity, a crew member might try to override your decision, one pod might be sabotaged. Pace the countdown with increasing urgency. Allow players to inspect pods, negotiate, or sacrifice themselves.

roles.name: Commander Elena Ross
roles.description: You are the station commander, responsible for crew safety. You must make the final call on who gets a pod.
roles.private_info: You know that one of the pods is damaged and can only hold 1 person instead of 3. You also have a secret escape pod in your quarters that holds 1 person.

roles.name: Engineer Jax
roles.description: You are the chief engineer. You know the station's systems intimately.
roles.private_info: You secretly repaired a damaged pod and can confirm it holds 3. You also know that the commander's private pod is a rumor, but you've seen it.

roles.name: Doctor Lena Chen
roles.description: You are the station doctor, tasked with triage and care.
roles.private_info: You have a terminal illness and would rather stay behind. You also know that two crew members are secretly hoarding extra oxygen tanks.

npcs.name: Chief of Security Marcus
npcs.description: A burly, no-nonsense officer who insists on a 'first come, first served' policy.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He wants to ensure his security team gets priority, and he might use force to guarantee it.

npcs.name: Biologist Tessa
npcs.description: A calm scientist who discovered a valuable asteroid sample that could revolutionize fuel.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She is secretly carrying the sample and believes her survival is crucial for humanity's future.

npcs.name: Pilot Samir
npcs.description: A skilled pilot necessary to fly the escape pods to safety.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He wants to be the last to leave in order to ensure everyone else is safe, but secretly fears being left behind.

npcs.name: Maintenance Worker Zoe
npcs.description: A quiet, efficient worker who has been with the station the longest.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She knows a secret maintenance tunnel that leads to an airtight storage room with enough oxygen for one person for a week. She might use it to survive alone.

npcs.name: Passenger Mr. Henderson
npcs.description: A wealthy corporate executive who was visiting to inspect the station.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He has bribed the engineer to secure a spot and is willing to pay anything to get off first.
